An update from VIP Play ( (VIPZ) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2025, VIP Play, Inc. entered into an amended credit agreement with Excel Family Partners for a line of credit up to $14 million, with a current outstanding balance of $15.676 million as of July 3, 2025. The agreement allows Excel to convert debt into common stock, providing flexibility in financial management and potential impacts on shareholder equity.

More about VIP Play

VIP Play, Inc. is a company operating in the financial sector, focusing on providing credit solutions. Its primary service includes offering discretionary convertible revolving lines of credit, with a market focus on flexible financing options.

Edge Total Intelligence Inc ( (TSE:CTRL) ) has provided an update.

Edge Total Intelligence Inc. has announced the grant of 250,000 incentive stock options to a director, exercisable at $0.52 per share, under its Omnibus Share Incentive Plan. Concurrently, the company has canceled 1,050,000 previously granted stock options with a higher exercise price of $1.03, which were voluntarily surrendered by certain directors and officers. This strategic adjustment in stock options could potentially optimize the company’s compensation structure and align incentives more effectively with its current market conditions.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CTRL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CTRL is a Underperform.

Edge Total Intelligence Inc’s overall stock score reflects severe financial challenges, including high leverage and poor cash flow, compounded by bearish technical indicators. The valuation metrics further highlight ongoing losses. While corporate events provide some optimism for future strategic positioning, they do not significantly mitigate the current financial and operational difficulties.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CTRL stock, click here.

More about Edge Total Intelligence Inc

Edge Total Intelligence Inc. operates in the digital operations software industry, offering a platform called edgeCore™. This software integrates multiple applications and data sources into a Digital Twin, enhancing situational awareness and operational efficiency for global enterprises, service providers, and governments. The platform’s low-code development capability supports rapid transformation of siloed systems and data, improving margins and agility across various domains.

data.title: Blum Holdings Acquires Majority Interest in Cannabis Retail
data.description:

An update from Blum Holdings ( (BLMH) ) is now available.

On July 1, 2025, Blüm Holdings entered into a binding term sheet to acquire a majority interest in a Northern California cannabis retail operator. The transaction, valued at $5 million, is structured as an all-stock deal with performance-based earn-outs. Through a Management Services Agreement, Blüm has gained operational control of the target’s business, consolidating its operations into Blüm’s financial statements. This acquisition is part of Blüm’s strategy to expand its retail platform and strengthen its market position in California, with the transaction expected to close in Q3 2025.

Spark’s Take on BLMH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BLMH is a Neutral.

Blum Holdings’ overall stock score reflects mixed factors. The significant financial challenges and bearish technical indicators weigh heavily, while positive corporate events and a low P/E ratio offer potential upside. The absence of earnings call data limits comprehensive assessment.

To see Spark’s full report on BLMH stock, click here.

More about Blum Holdings

Blüm Holdings is a prominent player in the cannabis industry, known for its commitment to quality, innovation, and customer service. The company operates leading dispensaries across California and owns several brands, including Korova, famous for its high potency products. As a holding company and marketing platform, Blüm aims to enhance customer and retail investor acquisition, increase brand awareness, and create value across its portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 3,531

On July 3, 2025, Telecom Argentina announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Gabriel Blasi, will step down from his position in the last quarter of the year due to personal reasons. The company praised Mr. Blasi for his significant contributions and leadership, which have helped solidify Telecom Argentina’s position as an industry leader. During the transition period, Telecom Argentina will implement succession plans to ensure continued management quality and operational stability.

data.description:

Xcite Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:XRI) ) has issued an announcement.

Xcite Resources Inc. has entered into six amending agreements with Eagle Plains Resources Ltd. to postpone cash payments and work commitments related to its Athabasca uranium property portfolio. In exchange, Xcite will issue 150,000 common shares to Eagle Plains, reflecting a strategic move to manage its financial obligations while continuing its exploration efforts in the uranium sector.

More about Xcite Resources, Inc.

Xcite Resources Inc. is an early-stage exploration company focused on discovering and developing energy transition metals. The company is working on a uranium project portfolio in the Athabasca basin, aiming for high-grade discoveries using new geological modeling in a historically significant uranium camp.

Jayud Global Logistics Limited Class A ( (JYD) ) has shared an update.

On June 30, 2025, Jayud Global Logistics Limited’s board of directors made significant leadership changes by removing Alan Tan Khim Guan from his role as Co-Chief Executive Officer and appointing him as the Head of Southeast Asia Business. Consequently, Xiaogang Geng will continue to serve as the sole Chief Executive Officer, a move that could streamline decision-making and potentially strengthen the company’s focus on its Southeast Asian operations.

More about Jayud Global Logistics Limited Class A

Jayud Global Logistics Limited is a logistics company based in Shenzhen, China, focusing on providing comprehensive logistics solutions, particularly in the Southeast Asia region.

data.title: Arya Resources Completes Second Tranche of Flow-Through Financing
data.description:
Don’t Miss TipRanks’ Half-Year Sale

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.
  • Make smarter investment decisions with TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks, delivered to your inbox every week.

An announcement from Arya Resources Ltd ( (TSE:RBZ) ) is now available.

Arya Resources Ltd. has completed its second tranche of flow-through financing, raising approximately $130,000 through the issuance of 866,666 flow-through shares. The funds will be used to support exploration work on its Saskatchewan-based mineral projects, including the Wedge Lake Gold Project. Additionally, Arya has received approval for an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Ramp East Property, which is strategically located near a recent discovery by Ramp Metals. This move is expected to strengthen Arya’s position in the mineral exploration industry and enhance its project portfolio.

More about Arya Resources Ltd

Arya Resources Ltd. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on discovering and developing precious and energy metals in Saskatchewan. The company’s portfolio includes gold, silver, copper, nickel, and cobalt assets, with a focus on advancing its flagship Wedge Lake Gold Project and the Dunlop Nickel-Copper-Cobalt Project.

Average Trading Volume: 32,996

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$4.33M

An update from Pluri ( (PLUR) ) is now available.

On June 30, 2025, Pluri held its 2025 Annual Meeting where shareholders voted on several proposals. Key decisions included the election of directors, ratification of the accounting firm Kesselman & Kesselman, approval of the 2016 Equity Compensation Plan, and the determination that future advisory votes on executive compensation will occur every two years. Additionally, the approval of the exercise of warrants related to a private placement offering was confirmed, excluding shares owned by Mr. Alexandre Weinstein.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLUR) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pluri stock, see the PLUR Stock Forecast page.
